mn.d:
n a hard brittle grey polyvalent metallic element that resembles iron but is not magnetic; used in making steel; occurs in many minerals
n a midwestern state

mna.t: abbr. 甲基壬基乙醛（Methyl Nonyl Acetaldehyde）；护理管理学硕士（Master of Nursing Administration）

mnc.t: abbr. meningococcal serogroup C 脑膜球菌血清群C

mncs.t: [计]= Multipoint Network Control System,多点网络控制系统

mnd.t: abbr. minimum necrosing dose 最小坏死剂量

mne.t: abbr. Master of Nuclear Engineering 核工程学硕士

mneme.t: n. [心][生理]记忆力, 记忆基质

mnemic.t: a. 记忆的, 记忆力的

mnemic theory.t: [医] 潜记忆迹假说(该假说认为细胞对外界的影响有记忆力)

mnemonic.t:
a. 记忆的, 助记的
n. 助记符
[计] 助记的, 助记符
mnemonic.d:
n. a device (such as a rhyme or acronym) used to aid recall
a. of or relating to or involved the practice of aiding the memory

mnemonic automatic programming.t: [计] 助记式自动程序设计

mnemonical.t: a. 帮助记忆的, 记忆术的

mnemonics.t:
n. 记忆术
[医] 记忆术
mnemonics.d: n. a method or system for improving the memory

mnemonist.d: n. an expert in the use of mnemonics; someone able to perform unusual feats of memory

mnemosyne.t: n. [希神]摩涅莫辛涅(记忆女神)
mnemosyne.d: n (Greek mythology) the Titaness who was goddess of memory; mother of the Muses

mnemotechnic.t: a. 记忆的, 记忆术的
mnemotechnic.d: a of or relating to or involved the practice of aiding the memory

mnes.t: (mne 的复数) abbr. Master of Nuclear Engineering 核工程学硕士

mnf.t: [计]= Multisystem Networking Facility,多系统连网设备

mniaceae.t: [网络] 提灯藓科；提灯藓属

mnimh.t: abbr. Member of the National Institute of Medical Herbalists 国家草药医师协会

mnium.t: [网络] 提灯藓属；提灯苔属；水木草

mnm.t: abbr. minimum 最小量; 最小数; mnemonic 记忆的; 记忆术的

mnos memory.t: [计] 金属氮化硅氧化硅半导体存储器

mnr.t: abbr. mean neap rise 平均小潮升

mnrs.t: (mnr 的复数) abbr. mean neap rise 平均小潮升

mnt.t: abbr. 医学营养治疗（medical nutrition therapy）；一硝基甲苯（mononitrotoluene）；蒙古图格里克
